repo_path.description: Path to the Git repository for snapshot exports

auto_sync_on_startup.description: Automatically take a snapshot when Anki starts

auto_snapshot_on_close.description: Automatically take a snapshot when Anki closes

debounce_delay_ms.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for auto-export on note changes

media_strategy.description: Media file handling strategy (none, symlink, copy)

remote_url.description: Remote Git URL for push after snapshot

auto_push_after_snapshot.description: Automatically push to remote after each snapshot
